emails.subject: Re: 2/20 Checkout
emails.body: Re: 2/20 Checkout Wow! That's so exciting to see the words "clean checkout" associated with OUR beloved brokers and traders. Thanks for your persistence with all of this I know it gets frustrating. Please let me know whenever I can help I'm trying to respond quickly to the e-mails coming from Houston confirms, but in the interest of accuracy I'm also trying to be thorough. So feel free to give me a nudge every once in awhile. Thanks, Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 02/20/2001 02:41 PM

emails.subject: 2/20 Checkout
emails.body: 2/20 Checkout Kate, to cover my you know what.....this will be the new daily checkout for all of my brokers. I am sending this to ensure a quality checkout to minimize any risks associated with our transactions. Even if I don't have any errors I will still send a summary everyday of my checkouts for the west deals. We have had several deals pop up from the brokers that we didn't know about and did not verbal the day of the trade and this will serve as proof of the previous days checkout. Amerex West Checkout No errors- Clean Checkout Prebon West Checkout No errors-Clean Checkout Bloomberg Checkout No errors-Clean Checkout Thanks!!

emails.subject: Re: 2/20 Checkout
emails.body: Sure, no problem!!! P.S. I guess last week was enough to wake those traders up..... Thanks again for all your help! Maybe we should give them a cookie for such clean checkout today and promise them another cookie tomorrow if they get their deals right!!! ahahahaha Kate Symes ECT 02/20/2001 04:40 PM
